title: N/A option for number and date columns
excerpt: It would be helpful to be able to enter “not applicable” or a dash or something similar for columns that are formatted for numbers or dates, such that if a date is not applicable for that particular item on a board, it d…

posts.author: eming (Eileen Ming)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be helpful to be able to enter “not applicable” or a dash or something similar for columns that are formatted for numbers or dates, such that if a date is not applicable for that particular item on a board, it doesn’t just look blank, nor does it have an incorrect date in it. Thanks!
